mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feed ( username, feed_content, reply_cnt,created_at, edited_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{feedContent}, #{replyCnt},NOW(), NOW(), #{deleted} )
mapper.select: SELECT f.feed_id, f.username, f.feed_content, f.created_at, f.reply_cnt, m.nickname, m.skin_type, m.personal_color,mp.saved_name AS profileImage, mp.file_path AS profilePath,count(fl_all.like_id) AS likeCnt, CASE WHEN fl_me.like_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE true END AS liked FROM feed f JOIN member m ON f.username = m.username LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON f.username = mp.username LEFT JOIN feed_like fl_all ON f.feed_id = fl_all.feed_id LEFT JOIN feed_like fl_me ON f.feed_id = fl_me.feed_id AND fl_me.username = #{username} WHERE f.deleted = 0 AND m.deleted=0 GROUP BY f.feed_id, f.username, f.feed_content, f.created_at, f.deleted, m.nickname, m.skin_type, m.personal_color, fl_me.like_id ORDER BY f.feed_id DESC
SELECT feed_content FROM feed WHERE feed_id = #{feedId}
SELECT count(*) FROM feed WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE feed SET deleted=1 WHERE feed_id=#{feedId}
UPDATE feed SET feed_content = #{feedContent} WHERE feed_id=#{feedId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM feed_like WHERE feed_id=#{feedId} AND username=#{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feed_like( feed_id, username ) VALUES ( #{feedId}, #{username} )
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM feed_like WHERE feed_id=#{feedId}
